text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the start of summer camp. I show Sakura Chiyono O my
notes on our agenda and what I want her to focus on.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Okay, okay... I guess that's summer camp for you—we have a ton to
get through!
choice_data_list: It is a bigger workload. Think you can handle it?
It is a bigger workload. Think you can handle it?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Of course! I trust you and your Trainynotes!
choice_data_list: "Trainy...notes?"

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Problems I need to work on, techniques I can use to
improve—they're all written here in this notebook.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm guessing you read those books you bought and put a lot of
thought into coming up with this regimen.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Which means, all your care and hard work as a trainer is packed in
here—it's your Trainynotes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Just watch—I'll use our time at camp to improve as much as I can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her eyes light up, burning bright with determination.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Gasp! ...Almost to shore!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Can't stop yet! Ten more sets! "The Chiyo that walks about finds the
starting gate"!

text_block_list.name: Student at Camp A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't you think Chiyo seems almost like a different person since
coming here?

text_block_list.name: Student at Camp B
text_block_list.text: Yeah, she's like super into it. We have to train harder too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... That should be everything for today!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I feel like everyone was staring at me on the way here... Was I doing
something weird?
choice_data_list: Nope, you were just being yourself.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh? Guess there's nothing to worry about then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our days of endless training continue, and before we know it, camp
draws to a close.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: R-really?!
choice_data_list:
Yep, your time's definitely improved since the
start of camp.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: 0.1 seconds... Our 0.1 seconds!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's not much... almost nothing really, but still! I'm that much closer to
Maruzen now, aren't I?
choice_data_list: You sure are. Do you feel it?
You sure are. Do you feel it?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yes! Ehehe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our summer camp comes to an end. And now...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I didn't know there was a festival going on so close by. Thanks for
bringing me here!
choice_data_list: A little treat for all your hard work.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Then I'll be sure to make the most of it! Cotton candy, yo-yo
fishing, goldfish scooping, and... Oh!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
This plush doggie, doesn't it kinda remind you of Maruzen? Like how
fluffy it is, and those kind eyes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: It's so cute! Hey there, little guy, you wanna come home with me?
choice_data_list: It reminds me of you, actually.
It reminds me of you, actually.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: M-me?! You mean...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wait, n-n-no! Never mind! Ahaha. Oh, Trainer, you're funny, you know
that?

text_block_list.name: Stall Owner
text_block_list.text:
You two take a liking to that stuffed animal? Then why don't ya have
a go at our katanuki challenge?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Katanuki?

text_block_list.name: Stall Owner
text_block_list.text:
Here's how it works: you take this sheet of candy here, and using a
needle and your fingers, cut out the shape in the middle!

text_block_list.name: Stall Owner
text_block_list.text:
Make a clean cut, and I'll give ya the doggie as a prize! How about it?
Up for a try?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ooh, I do really like the doggie, but... this looks kind of hard.
choice_data_list: I'll give it a try!
I'll give it a try!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hm? ...Wait, what?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All fired up to win Chiyono O her prize, I give the katanuki challenge
a go, only to find it more difficult than I thought...

text_block_list.name: Stall Owner
text_block_list.text: Oof, close but no cigar. How about another go?
choice_data_list: Okay! I'll get it this time!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wait, um, Trainer? Maybe you should start out away from the indents!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Looking at your previous tries, slowly chipping away at the perimeter
seemed like the safest option, so...
choice_data_list: Got it! I can always count on you, Chiyo!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
W-what? No, I was just jotting down notes as I watched... A-anyway,
you've got this!

text_block_list.name: Stall Owner
text_block_list.text: Ohh! We have a winner! And to the victor goes the stuffed animal!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Y-you're sure I can have it?
choice_data_list: Yep, another reward for your work at camp.
Yep, another reward for your work at camp.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! I'll name you Sakura Dogg-O. Woof, woof!
choice_data_list: He really does look like you.
He really does look like you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Y-you're the only one who thinks that!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ahem! Whether it looks like me or not aside, um... thank you once
again.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Not just for this little guy, but for all of summer camp, and everything
before that too...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Remember what you told me once? That watching me gives you
strength, and seeing me work hard gives you courage.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I feel the same way. When I see you working hard, it makes me want
to do my best too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've found more strength than I ever did alone. I've come so much
farther than I ever could alone.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So I know that as long as we keep working hard together, I can get
even stronger!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'll be your source of strength, and you'll be mine.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
And then, even winning the Derby won't just be some faroff
dream—we'll be strong enough to do it for real!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Or, um... th-that's what this little fella thinks, anyway...
choice_data_list: Well, I agree with Dogg-O.
Well, I agree with Dogg-O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I... I'm going to make my dreams come true! Even if I can't grow as
quick as everyone else, no matter how long it takes, I swear I will!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: "The late-blooming sakura is still a sakura," am I right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As if in agreement, fireworks bloom bright in the night sky.
